            ,'30-N5-3',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'30-N5-4',taux_verse
            ,'30-N5-5',taux_recu
            ,'30-N5-6',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'30-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'30-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
             /*Inflation Swaps*/
            ,'40-N1-1',null     
            ,'40-N2-1',null    
            ,'40-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'40-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'40-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_share_par),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'40-N5-2',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'40-N5-3',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'40-N5-4',taux_verse
            ,'40-N5-5',taux_recu
            ,'40-N5-6',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'40-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'40-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
            /*Equity Linked Swaps*/
            ,'50-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'50-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_fund_cost_price),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G999PR','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'50-N5-2',act_sht_description_ctp
            ,'50-N5-3',ins_lng_description_sj        
            ,'50-N5-4',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'50-N5-5',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'50-N5-6',to_char(ndna_fund_dirty_value,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G999PR','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'50-N7-1',to_char(ndna_fund_dirty_value_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G999PR','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
             /*Total Return Swaps*/
            ,'60-N1-1',null     
            ,'60-N2-1',null    
            ,'60-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'60-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'60-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_share_par),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'60-N5-2',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'60-N5-3',upper(act_lng_description_ctp)
            ,'60-N5-4',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'60-N5-5',taux_verse
            ,'60-N5-6',taux_recu
            ,'60-N5-7',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'60-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'60-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
             /*Contracts for difference*/
            ,'70-N1-1',null     
            ,'70-N2-1',null    
            ,'70-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'70-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'70-N5-1',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'70-N5-2',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'70-N5-3',upper(act_lng_description_ctp)
            ,'70-N5-4','#O/S Underlying'
            ,'70-N5-5','#O/S Long positions'
            ,'70-N5-6','#O/S Short positions'
            ,'70-N5-7',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'70-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'70-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
           ) as valeur_bloc
    ,'SWP_'||decode(case when niveau in ('N1','N2','N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_rubrique_cible||'-'end||niveau
            ,'N0','N0'
            ,'10-N1','RATE_N1'
            ,'20-N1','CDS_N1'
            ,'30-N1','PERF_N1'
            ,'40-N1','INFL_N1'
            ,'50-N1','LINK_N1'
            ,'60-N1','TRS_N1'
            ,'70-N1','CFD_N1'
            ,'10-N2','RATE_N2'
            ,'20-N2','CDS_N2'
            ,'30-N2','PERF_N2'
            ,'40-N2','INFL_N2'
            ,'50-N2','LINK_N2'
            ,'60-N2','TRS_N2'
            ,'70-N2','CFD_N2'
            ,'10-N3','RATE_N3'
            ,'20-N3','CDS_N3'
            ,'30-N3','PERF_N3'
            ,'40-N3','INFL_N3'
            ,'50-N3','LINK_N3'
            ,'60-N3','TRS_N3'
            ,'70-N3','CFD_N3'
            ,'10-N4','RATE_N4'
            ,'20-N4','CDS_N4'
            ,'30-N4','PERF_N4'
            ,'40-N4','INFL_N4'
            ,'50-N4','LINK_N4'
            ,'60-N4','TRS_N4'
            ,'70-N4','CFD_N4'
            ,'10-N5','RATE_N5'
            ,'20-N5','CDS_N5'
            ,'30-N5','PERF_N5'
            ,'40-N5','INFL_N5'
            ,'50-N5','LINK_N5'
            ,'60-N5','TRS_N5'
            ,'70-N5','CFD_N5'
            ,'10-N6','RATE_N6'
            ,'20-N6','CDS_N6'
            ,'30-N6','PERF_N6'
            ,'40-N6','INFL_N6'
            ,'50-N6','LINK_N6'
            ,'60-N6','TRS_N6'
            ,'70-N6','CFD_N6'
            ,'10-N7','RATE_N7'
            ,'20-N7','CDS_N7'
            ,'30-N7','PERF_N7'
            ,'40-N7','INFL_N7'
            ,'60-N7','TRS_N7'
            ,'70-N7','CFD_N7'
           ) as template
    ,decode(niveau,'N0',1,'N1',2,'N2',3,'N3',4,'N4',5,'N5',6,'N6',7,'N7',8) row_level
    /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/    
    /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
    ,decode(case when niveau in ('N1','N2','N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_rubrique_cible||'-'end||niveau||
                case when niveau in ('N5','N6','N7') then '-'||id_colonne end
            ,'N0','Titre de note : Swaps'
            ,'10-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'10-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'10-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'10-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'10-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal'
            ,'10-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'10-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity du contrat'
            ,'10-N5-4','Ligne détail : Flow/Rate paid'
            ,'10-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flow/Rate received'
            ,'10-N5-6','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'10-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant pmvp'
            ,'10-N7-1','Phrase de fin de compart'
            ,'20-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'20-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'20-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'20-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'20-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-4','Ligne détail : Underlying du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-5','Ligne détail : Sens Purchase/Sale du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-6','Ligne détail : Premium du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-7','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'20-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant pmvp'
            ,'20-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'30-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'30-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'30-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'30-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'30-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrate'
            ,'30-N5-4','Ligne détail : Flows Paid du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flows Received du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-6','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'30-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'30-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'40-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'40-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'40-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'40-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'40-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrate'
            ,'40-N5-4','Ligne détail : Flows Paid du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flows Received du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-6','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'40-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'40-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'50-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'50-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'50-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'50-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'50-N5-1','Ligne détail : notionnel'
            ,'50-N5-2','Ligne détail : contrepartie'
            ,'50-N5-3','Ligne détail : libellé du sous-jacent'
            ,'50-N5-4','Ligne détail : devise'
            ,'50-N5-5','Ligne détail : date d''échéance'
            ,'50-N5-6','Ligne détail : valeur boursière'
            ,'50-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'60-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'60-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'60-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'60-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'60-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-3','Ligne détail : Contrepartie'
            ,'60-N5-4','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrate'
            ,'60-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flows Paid du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-6','Ligne détail : Flows Received du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-7','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'60-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'60-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'70-N5-1','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'70-N5-2','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrat'
            ,'70-N5-3','Ligne détail : Contrepartie'
            ,'70-N5-4','Ligne détail : Underlying'
            ,'70-N5-5','Ligne détail : Number long positions'
            ,'70-N5-6','Ligne détail : Number short positions'
            ,'70-N5-7','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'70-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant pmvp'
            ,'70-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ) as description_bloc
    /*INFO_BLOC*/    
    ,'[ga]'||:1 ||'[/ga]'
        ||'[st]'||:2 ||'[/st]'
        ||'[dt]'||:3 ||'[/dt]'
        ||'[fd]'||
        case
            when niveau in ('N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_fnd_code
            end ||'[/fd]'              
        ||'[tl]'||
        case id_rubrique_cible||'-'||niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            when '10-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'
            when '20-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'
            when '40-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'
            when '60-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'                    
            when '70-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'                    
            when '10-N5-6' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'
            when '20-N5-7' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'
            when '40-N5-6' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'
            when '60-N5-7' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'            
            when '70-N5-7' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'            
            end || '[/tl]'
        ||'[tb]POS_'||
        case id_rubrique_cible
            when 10 then 'SWP_RATE'
            when 20 then 'SWP_CDS'
            when 30 then 'SWP_PERF'
            when 40 then 'SWP_INFL'
            when 50 then 'SWP_LINK'
            when 60 then 'SWP_TRS'
            when 70 then 'SWP_CFD'
            end || '[/tb]'
        ||'[co]'||id_colonne||'[/co]'
        ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
        ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
        ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
        ||'[vb]'||
        case 
            when id_rubrique_cible||'-'||niveau||'-'||id_colonne in ('10-N5-1','20-N5-1','30-N5-1','40-N5-1','50-N5-1','60-N5-1','70-N5-1') 
                 then vb_pour_module_controles
            end ||'[/vb]'              
        ||'[ic]'||
        case 
            when niveau='N5' then id_ins_code
            end ||'[/ic]'
            as info_bloc
from
    (
    select
        /*Phrase de pied de tableau*/
        case 
            when niveau='N7' and id_colonne=1 then
                case 
                    when instr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,', ')=0 then 'The counterparty of '
                        ||case 
                             when nb_positions_compart=1 then 'this '||lib_rubrique_cible 
                             else 'these '||lib_rubrique_cible||'s'
                             end
                        ||' is '
                        ||act_lng_description_ctp_liste
                    else 'The counterparties of these '||lib_rubrique_cible||'s are '
                        ||substr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,1,instr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,', ',-1)-1) 
                        ||' and'||substr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,instr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,', ',-1)+1)
                    end
                    ||'.'
            end phrase_contreparties
        ,srq5.*
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by  id_rubrique_cible,position,rupture_compart_asc,niveau) id_ligne            
            ,srq3.*
            ,srq4.*
        from
            (
            /*Titre de la note*/
            select 'N0' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne from dual 
            union
            /*Sous-titre de la note*/
            select 'N1', 1 from dual 
            union
            /*Ligne d'introduction*/
            select 'N2' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne from dual 
            union
            /*Titre de compartiment*/
            select 'N3',1 from dual
            union
            /*Titre de colonne*/
            select 'N4',1 from dual union select 'N4',2 from dual 
            union
            /*Ligne de détail*/
            select 'N5',1 from dual union select 'N5',2 from dual union select 'N5',3 from dual union select 'N5',4 from dual union select 'N5',5 from dual union select 'N5',6 from dual union select 'N5',7 from dual union select 'N5',8
             from dual  
            union
            /*Ligne de total ou Phrase de fin de compart*/
            select 'N6',1 from dual union select 'N6',2 from dual 
            union
            /*Phrase de fin de compart*/
            select 'N7',1 from dual 
            )srq3    
                ,    
            (
            select
                upper(listagg(case when index_doublons_contreparties = 1 then act_lng_description_ctp end,', ') within group (order by act_lng_description_ctp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, position)) act_lng_description_ctp_liste
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (
                select                                    
                    row_number() over(order by id_rubrique_cible, position, id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/, id_ndna_pos_status_2) rupture_note_asc
                    ,row_number() over(order by id_rubrique_cible desc, position desc,id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/ desc, id_ndna_pos_status_2 desc) rupture_note_desc
    
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible order by position, id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/, id_ndna_pos_status_2) rupture_tableau_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible order by position desc,id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/ desc, id_ndna_pos_status_2 desc) rupture_tableau_desc
                    
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code order by id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/, id_ndna_pos_status_2) rupture_compart_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code order by id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/ desc, id_ndna_pos_status_2 desc) rupture_compart_desc
    
                    ,count(*) over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible) nb_positions_compart                                    
    
                    ,dense_rank() over(order by id_rubrique_cible) increment_num_rubrique_cible
    
                    ,sum(ndna_share_par_tmp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code) ndna_share_par_cumul
                    ,sum(ndna_fund_dirty_value_tmp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code) ndna_fund_dirty_value_cumul
                    ,sum(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code) ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul
    
                    ,ndna_fund_dirty_value_tmp ndna_fund_dirty_value
                    ,ndna_share_par_tmp ndna_share_par
                    /*Préparation contreparties*/
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, position,act_lng_description_ctp order by act_lng_description_ctp) index_doublons_contreparties                                                         
                    
                    ,srq1.*
                from
                    (
                    select
                        row_number() over(partition by position,key_ref_instrument order by position, key_ref_instrument, id_ndna_pos_status_2) index_jambe_swaps
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_income_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) ndna_fund_income
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_dirty_value_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) ndna_fund_dirty_value_tmp
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp                                        
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_dirty_value_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) vb_pour_module_controles
                        ,srq0.*
                    from
                        (
                        /*Requete brute GP3*/
                        select distinct
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.libelle_long
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                   (
                                   select distinct
                                       qasgc2.position
                                   from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc2
                                   where
                                       qasgc2.id_structure=srq_photo.id_structure
                                       and qasgc2.id_gabarit=srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and qasgc2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                   ),qasgc.position)position
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(qsm.code_mapping_source,srq_photo.id_fnd_code)id_fnd_code
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       srq_photo2.ntna_fund_total_net_asset
                                    from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo2 
                                    where 
                                       srq_photo2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and srq_photo2.id_gabarit = srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and srq_photo2.date_campagne=srq_photo.date_campagne
                                    ),srq_photo.ntna_fund_total_net_asset)ntna_fund_total_net_asset
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       srq_photo2.id_neve_nav_date
                                    from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo2 
                                    where 
                                       srq_photo2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and srq_photo2.id_gabarit = srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and srq_photo2.date_campagne=srq_photo.date_campagne
                                    ),srq_photo.id_neve_nav_date)id_neve_nav_date
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       qc2.fnd_lng_description
                                    from qxp_compartiment qc2 
                                    where 
                                       qc2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and (qc2.date_fin_compart is null or qc2.date_fin_compart >=:4 )
                                    ),qc.fnd_lng_description)fnd_lng_description
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       srq_photo2.fnd_currency
                                    from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo2 
                                    where 
                                       srq_photo2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and srq_photo2.id_gabarit = srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and srq_photo2.date_campagne=srq_photo.date_campagne
                                    ),srq_photo.fnd_currency)fnd_currency
                            ,srq_photo.id_ins_category
                            /*Indicateur d'exclusion des options si non détenues par le compartiment MENA*/
                            ,case when srq_photo.id_ins_category='OPTI' and srq_photo.id_fnd_code='409096'
                                  then 'N'
                                  end options_classiques
                            /*Gestion de l'exception EUR INFL LINKED (409051) concernant les options en Equity Linked Swaps*/
                            ,case 
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IRS' then 10
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then 20
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'EQS' then 30
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IFS' then 40                              
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CIRS' then 10                              
                                  end id_rubrique_cible
                            ,case 
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IRS' then 'Interest Rate Swap'
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then 'Credit Default Swap'
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'EQS' then 'Performance Swap'
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IFS' then 'Inflation Swap'                              
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CIRS' then 'Interest Rate Swap'/*'Cross currency IRS'*/                             
                                  end lib_rubrique_cible                                                       
                            ,qstdc.id_rubrique_cible id_rubrique_cible_old
                            ,qstdc.lib_rubrique_cible lib_rubrique_cible_old
                            ,qstdc.sequence_niveau sequence_niveau_old
                            ,srq_photo.key_ref_instrument
                            ,srq_photo.id_ins_code
                            ,srq_photo.ins_lng_description
                            ,srq_photo.ins_aim
                            ,srq_photo.ins_maturity_date
                            ,case 
                                when rtrim(qsrs.taux_recu,'0123456789.,-') is null and length(qsrs.taux_recu) is not null then
                                    case
                                        when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_recu,'.',','),'FM9G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
                                        else
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_recu,'.',','),'FM9G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')||'%'
                                        end
                                else qsrs.taux_recu
                                end taux_recu
                            ,case 
                                when rtrim(qsrs.taux_verse,'0123456789.,-') is null and length(qsrs.taux_verse) is not null then
                                    case
                                        when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_verse,'.',','),'FM9G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
                                        else
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_verse,'.',','),'FM9G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')||'%'
                                        end
                                else qsrs.taux_verse
                                end taux_verse
                            ,srq_photo.ins_counterpart
                            ,srq_photo.act_sht_description_ctp
                            ,nvl(qsrs.contrepartie,'#O/S') act_lng_description_ctp
                            ,srq_photo.ocr_id_translation_cpt                                
                            ,srq_photo.ins_sht_description_sj
                            ,srq_photo.ins_lng_description_sj                                        
                            ,srq_photo.id_ndna_pos_status_1             
                            ,srq_photo.id_ndna_pos_status_2             
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_quotation_cur
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_share_par ndna_share_par_tmp
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_share_par ndna_share_par_old
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_cost_price                                        
                            ,(srq_photo.ndna_fund_dirty_value - srq_photo.ndna_fund_income) ndna_fund_dirty_value_org
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_income ndna_fund_income_org
                            ,abs(srq_photo.ndna_fund_dirty_value_h - srq_photo.ndna_fund_income_h) ndna_fund_dirty_value_h
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_unreal_pl ndna_fund_unreal_pl_org
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_dirty_value_h ndna_fund_dirty_value_h_old
                            ,qsrs.description_sj
                        from 
                            qxp.qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo
                        left join qxp.qxp_structure qs on srq_photo.id_structure=qs.id_structure
                        left join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on srq_photo.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                            and srq_photo.id_gabarit = qasgc.id_gabarit
                            and srq_photo.id_gabarit = :5 
                            and srq_photo.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code                                    
                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on srq_photo.id_fnd_code=qc.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_transco_data_source qstds on srq_photo.ocr_id_translation_cpt='OCR\'||qstds.id_critere_source
                             and qstds.tableau_id='NOTE_SWAPS_AMUNDI_EN'             
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_transco_data_cible qstdc on qstds.id_rubrique_cible=qstdc.id_rubrique_cible    
                             and qstds.tableau_id=qstdc.tableau_id                                               
                        left join 
                                (
                                select distinct *
                                from qxp.qxp_sup_ref_swp 
                                )qsrs on srq_photo.id_ins_code=qsrs.id_ins_code
                             and qsrs.echeance_rapport=:6 
                             and qsrs.nom_rapport='AMUNDI FUND'

                        /*Gestion des Master-Feeders*/
                        left join qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=srq_photo.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping in 'MASTER-FEEDERS'
                            and qsm.date_campagne in '31/12/2199'

                        where
                            srq_photo.id_structure=:7 
                            and srq_photo.date_campagne=last_day(:8 )
                            and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart >=:9 )
                            and srq_photo.id_ins_category in ('SWAT','OPTI','DECR')
                            and srq_photo.ndna_share_par<>0
                        )srq0
                    )srq1
                where
                     index_jambe_swaps=1 /*Eliminer la deuxième jambe de swaps*/
                     and not (id_ins_category='OPTI' and options_classiques is null) /*Eliminer les options en position sur d'autres compartiments que MENA (409096)*/
                )srq2
            )srq4
         /*Filtre de la matrice*/
         where            
             (
             /*Titre de la note*/    
             (niveau='N0' and rupture_note_asc=1)         
             /*Sous-titre de la note*/    
             or (niveau='N1' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
            /*Ligne d'introduction*/
            or (niveau='N2' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)    
            /*Titre de compartiment*/
             or (niveau='N3' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
            /*Titre de colonne*/
             or (niveau='N4' and rupture_compart_asc=1 and id_colonne < 2) --decode(id_rubrique_cible,20,3,2))/*2 données devise fonds pour les CDS sinon 1 seule*/
            /*Ligne de détail*/
             or (niveau='N5' and id_colonne < decode(id_rubrique_cible,10,7,20,8,30,7,40,7,50,8,60,8,70,7)) /*Nombre de colonnes différent par tableau*/
            /*Ligne de total ou Phrase de fin de compart*/
             or (niveau='N6' and rupture_compart_desc=1 and id_colonne < decode(id_rubrique_cible,10,2,20,2,30,2,40,2,60,2,70,2,1) and nb_positions_compart >0) /*2 données totalisées*/
             or (niveau='N7' and rupture_compart_desc=1 and id_colonne < decode(id_rubrique_cible,10,2,20,2,30,2,40,2,60,2,70,2,1))
             )
             and
                /*Elimination des lignes de pied de page suite à évolution besoin client*/
                1=
                case 
                    when niveau='N7' and id_rubrique_cible in (60,70) then 0
                    else 1
                    end
          
        )srq5   
    )
order by
     id_rubrique_cible
     ,position
     ,rupture_compart_asc
     ,niveau
     ,id_colonne, OriginalSql = /* Amundi Fund EN - Notes des swaps avec MEB_PHOTO
*/
select        
    niveau
    ,id_ligne  id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,id_colonne
    ,'SWP_'||decode(case when niveau in ('N1','N2','N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_rubrique_cible||'-'end||niveau
            ,'N0','N0'
            ,'10-N1','RATE_N1'
            ,'20-N1','CDS_N1'
            ,'30-N1','PERF_N1'
            ,'40-N1','INFL_N1'

            ,'70-N7','CFD_N7'
           ) ||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne as nom_bloc
    ,decode(case when niveau in ('N1','N2','N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_rubrique_cible||'-' end||niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            ,'N0-1','XX' 
             /*Interest rate swaps*/
            ,'10-N1-1',null     
            ,'10-N2-1',null

            ,'10-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'10-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
             /*Credit default swaps*/
            ,'20-N1-1',null     
            ,'20-N2-1',null

            ,'20-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'20-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_share_par),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')        
            ,'20-N5-2',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'20-N5-3',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'20-N5-4',nvl(description_sj,'#O/S')
            ,'20-N5-5',case when ndna_share_par >0 then 'Sale' else 'Purchase' end
            ,'20-N5-6',nvl(taux_recu,taux_verse)
            ,'20-N5-7',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'20-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'20-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
             /*Performance Swaps*/
            ,'30-N1-1',null     
            ,'30-N2-1',null    
            ,'30-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'30-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'30-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_share_par),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'30-N5-2',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'30-N5-3',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'30-N5-4',taux_verse
            ,'30-N5-5',taux_recu
            ,'30-N5-6',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'30-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'30-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
             /*Inflation Swaps*/
            ,'40-N1-1',null     
            ,'40-N2-1',null    
            ,'40-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'40-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'40-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_share_par),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'40-N5-2',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'40-N5-3',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')

            ,'40-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
            /*Equity Linked Swaps*/
            ,'50-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'50-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_fund_cost_price),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G999PR','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'50-N5-2',act_sht_description_ctp
            ,'50-N5-3',ins_lng_description_sj        
            ,'50-N5-4',ndna_quotation_cur

            ,'50-N7-1',to_char(ndna_fund_dirty_value_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G999PR','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
             /*Total Return Swaps*/
            ,'60-N1-1',null     
            ,'60-N2-1',null    
            ,'60-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'60-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'60-N5-1',to_char(abs(ndna_share_par),'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'60-N5-2',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'60-N5-3',upper(act_lng_description_ctp)
            ,'60-N5-4',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'60-N5-5',taux_verse
            ,'60-N5-6',taux_recu
            ,'60-N5-7',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'60-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'60-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
             /*Contracts for difference*/
            ,'70-N1-1',null     
            ,'70-N2-1',null    
            ,'70-N3-1',libelle_long||case when id_structure like '_P0_%' then ' - ' else ' ' end||fnd_lng_description
            ,'70-N4-1',fnd_currency /*Titres de colonnes*/
            ,'70-N5-1',ndna_quotation_cur
            ,'70-N5-2',to_char(ins_maturity_date,'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'70-N5-3',upper(act_lng_description_ctp)
            ,'70-N5-4','#O/S Underlying'
            ,'70-N5-5','#O/S Long positions'
            ,'70-N5-6','#O/S Short positions'
            ,'70-N5-7',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'70-N6-1',to_char(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
            ,'70-N7-1',phrase_contreparties
           ) as valeur_bloc
    ,'SWP_'||decode(case when niveau in ('N1','N2','N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_rubrique_cible||'-'end||niveau
            ,'N0','N0'
            ,'10-N1','RATE_N1'
            ,'20-N1','CDS_N1'
            ,'30-N1','PERF_N1'
            ,'40-N1','INFL_N1'

           ) as template
    ,decode(niveau,'N0',1,'N1',2,'N2',3,'N3',4,'N4',5,'N5',6,'N6',7,'N7',8) row_level
    /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/    
    /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
    ,decode(case when niveau in ('N1','N2','N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_rubrique_cible||'-'end||niveau||

            ,'N0','Titre de note : Swaps'
            ,'10-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible

            ,'10-N5-6','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'10-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant pmvp'
            ,'10-N7-1','Phrase de fin de compart'
            ,'20-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'20-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'20-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'20-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'20-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-4','Ligne détail : Underlying du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-5','Ligne détail : Sens Purchase/Sale du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-6','Ligne détail : Premium du contrat'
            ,'20-N5-7','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'20-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant pmvp'
            ,'20-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'30-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'30-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'30-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'30-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'30-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrate'
            ,'30-N5-4','Ligne détail : Flows Paid du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flows Received du contrat'
            ,'30-N5-6','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'30-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'30-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'40-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'40-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'40-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'40-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'40-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-3','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrate'
            ,'40-N5-4','Ligne détail : Flows Paid du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flows Received du contrat'
            ,'40-N5-6','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'40-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'40-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'50-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'50-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'50-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'50-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'50-N5-1','Ligne détail : notionnel'
            ,'50-N5-2','Ligne détail : contrepartie'
            ,'50-N5-3','Ligne détail : libellé du sous-jacent'
            ,'50-N5-4','Ligne détail : devise'
            ,'50-N5-5','Ligne détail : date d''échéance'
            ,'50-N5-6','Ligne détail : valeur boursière'
            ,'50-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'60-N1','Titre tableau : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'60-N2','Commentaire d''introduction : '||lib_rubrique_cible
            ,'60-N3','Titre : nom de compartiment '
            ,'60-N4','Entete de colonnes '|| id_colonne
            ,'60-N5-1','Ligne détail : Nominal du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-2','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-3','Ligne détail : Contrepartie'
            ,'60-N5-4','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrate'
            ,'60-N5-5','Ligne détail : Flows Paid du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-6','Ligne détail : Flows Received du contrat'
            ,'60-N5-7','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'60-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant'
            ,'60-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ,'70-N5-1','Ligne détail : Currency du contrat'
            ,'70-N5-2','Ligne détail : Maturity Date du contrat'
            ,'70-N5-3','Ligne détail : Contrepartie'
            ,'70-N5-4','Ligne détail : Underlying'
            ,'70-N5-5','Ligne détail : Number long positions'
            ,'70-N5-6','Ligne détail : Number short positions'
            ,'70-N5-7','Ligne détail : Pmvp du contrat'
            ,'70-N6-1','Ligne total compartiment : montant pmvp'
            ,'70-N7-1','Phrase de conclusion de compartiment'
            ) as description_bloc
    /*INFO_BLOC*/    
    ,'[ga]'||?||'[/ga]'
        ||'[st]'||?||'[/st]'
        ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
        ||'[fd]'||
        case
            when niveau in ('N3','N4','N5','N6','N7') then id_fnd_code
            end ||'[/fd]'              
        ||'[tl]'||
        case id_rubrique_cible||'-'||niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            when '10-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'
            when '20-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'
            when '40-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'
            when '60-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'                    
            when '70-N6-1' then 'A-T1.'                    
            when '10-N5-6' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'
            when '20-N5-7' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'
            when '40-N5-6' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'
            when '60-N5-7' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'            
            when '70-N5-7' then 'A-T1.'||dense_rank() over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible order by rupture_tableau_asc)||'.\'            
            end || '[/tl]'
        ||'[tb]POS_'||
        case id_rubrique_cible
            when 10 then 'SWP_RATE'
            when 20 then 'SWP_CDS'
            when 30 then 'SWP_PERF'
            when 40 then 'SWP_INFL'
            when 50 then 'SWP_LINK'
            when 60 then 'SWP_TRS'
            when 70 then 'SWP_CFD'
            end || '[/tb]'
        ||'[co]'||id_colonne||'[/co]'
        ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
        ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
        ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
        ||'[vb]'||
        case 
            when id_rubrique_cible||'-'||niveau||'-'||id_colonne in ('10-N5-1','20-N5-1','30-N5-1','40-N5-1','50-N5-1','60-N5-1','70-N5-1') 
                 then vb_pour_module_controles
            end ||'[/vb]'              
        ||'[ic]'||
        case 
            when niveau='N5' then id_ins_code
            end ||'[/ic]'
            as info_bloc
from
    (
    select
        /*Phrase de pied de tableau*/
        case 
            when niveau='N7' and id_colonne=1 then
                case 
                    when instr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,', ')=0 then 'The counterparty of '
                        ||case 
                             when nb_positions_compart=1 then 'this '||lib_rubrique_cible 
                             else 'these '||lib_rubrique_cible||'s'
                             end
                        ||' is '
                        ||act_lng_description_ctp_liste
                    else 'The counterparties of these '||lib_rubrique_cible||'s are '
                        ||substr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,1,instr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,', ',-1)-1) 
                        ||' and'||substr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,instr(act_lng_description_ctp_liste,', ',-1)+1)
                    end
                    ||'.'
            end phrase_contreparties
        ,srq5.*
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by  id_rubrique_cible,position,rupture_compart_asc,niveau) id_ligne            
            ,srq3.*
            ,srq4.*
        from
            (
            /*Titre de la note*/
            select 'N0' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne from dual 
            union
            /*Sous-titre de la note*/
            select 'N1', 1 from dual 
            union
            /*Ligne d'introduction*/
            select 'N2' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne from dual 
            union
            /*Titre de compartiment*/
            select 'N3',1 from dual
            union
            /*Titre de colonne*/
            select 'N4',1 from dual union select 'N4',2 from dual 
            union
            /*Ligne de détail*/
            select 'N5',1 from dual union select 'N5',2 from dual union select 'N5',3 from dual union select 'N5',4 from dual union select 'N5',5 from dual union select 'N5',6 from dual union select 'N5',7 from dual union select 'N5',8
             from dual  
            union
            /*Ligne de total ou Phrase de fin de compart*/
            select 'N6',1 from dual union select 'N6',2 from dual 
            union
            /*Phrase de fin de compart*/
            select 'N7',1 from dual 
            )srq3    
                ,    
            (
            select
                upper(listagg(case when index_doublons_contreparties = 1 then act_lng_description_ctp end,', ') within group (order by act_lng_description_ctp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, position)) act_lng_description_ctp_liste
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (
                select                                    
                    row_number() over(order by id_rubrique_cible, position, id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/, id_ndna_pos_status_2) rupture_note_asc
                    ,row_number() over(order by id_rubrique_cible desc, position desc,id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/ desc, id_ndna_pos_status_2 desc) rupture_note_desc
    
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible order by position, id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/, id_ndna_pos_status_2) rupture_tableau_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible order by position desc,id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/ desc, id_ndna_pos_status_2 desc) rupture_tableau_desc
                    
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code order by id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/, id_ndna_pos_status_2) rupture_compart_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code order by id_ins_code/*decode(id_rubrique_cible,50,ins_lng_description_sj,id_ins_code)*/ desc, id_ndna_pos_status_2 desc) rupture_compart_desc
    
                    ,count(*) over(partition by id_fnd_code,id_rubrique_cible) nb_positions_compart                                    
    
                    ,dense_rank() over(order by id_rubrique_cible) increment_num_rubrique_cible
    
                    ,sum(ndna_share_par_tmp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code) ndna_share_par_cumul
                    ,sum(ndna_fund_dirty_value_tmp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code) ndna_fund_dirty_value_cumul
                    ,sum(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp) over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, id_fnd_code) ndna_fund_unreal_pl_cumul
    
                    ,ndna_fund_dirty_value_tmp ndna_fund_dirty_value
                    ,ndna_share_par_tmp ndna_share_par
                    /*Préparation contreparties*/
                    ,row_number() over(partition by id_rubrique_cible, position,act_lng_description_ctp order by act_lng_description_ctp) index_doublons_contreparties                                                         
                    
                    ,srq1.*
                from
                    (
                    select
                        row_number() over(partition by position,key_ref_instrument order by position, key_ref_instrument, id_ndna_pos_status_2) index_jambe_swaps
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_income_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) ndna_fund_income
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_dirty_value_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) ndna_fund_dirty_value_tmp
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_unreal_pl_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) ndna_fund_unreal_pl_tmp                                        
                        ,sum(ndna_fund_dirty_value_org) over (partition by position,key_ref_instrument) vb_pour_module_controles
                        ,srq0.*
                    from
                        (
                        /*Requete brute GP3*/
                        select distinct
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.libelle_long
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                   (
                                   select distinct
                                       qasgc2.position
                                   from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc2
                                   where
                                       qasgc2.id_structure=srq_photo.id_structure
                                       and qasgc2.id_gabarit=srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and qasgc2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                   ),qasgc.position)position
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(qsm.code_mapping_source,srq_photo.id_fnd_code)id_fnd_code
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       srq_photo2.ntna_fund_total_net_asset
                                    from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo2 
                                    where 
                                       srq_photo2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and srq_photo2.id_gabarit = srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and srq_photo2.date_campagne=srq_photo.date_campagne
                                    ),srq_photo.ntna_fund_total_net_asset)ntna_fund_total_net_asset
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       srq_photo2.id_neve_nav_date
                                    from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo2 
                                    where 
                                       srq_photo2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and srq_photo2.id_gabarit = srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and srq_photo2.date_campagne=srq_photo.date_campagne
                                    ),srq_photo.id_neve_nav_date)id_neve_nav_date
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       qc2.fnd_lng_description
                                    from qxp_compartiment qc2 
                                    where 
                                       qc2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and (qc2.date_fin_compart is null or qc2.date_fin_compart >=?)
                                    ),qc.fnd_lng_description)fnd_lng_description
                            /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                            ,nvl(
                                    (
                                    select distinct
                                       srq_photo2.fnd_currency
                                    from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo2 
                                    where 
                                       srq_photo2.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                       and srq_photo2.id_gabarit = srq_photo.id_gabarit
                                       and srq_photo2.date_campagne=srq_photo.date_campagne
                                    ),srq_photo.fnd_currency)fnd_currency
                            ,srq_photo.id_ins_category
                            /*Indicateur d'exclusion des options si non détenues par le compartiment MENA*/
                            ,case when srq_photo.id_ins_category='OPTI' and srq_photo.id_fnd_code='409096'
                                  then 'N'
                                  end options_classiques
                            /*Gestion de l'exception EUR INFL LINKED (409051) concernant les options en Equity Linked Swaps*/
                            ,case 
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IRS' then 10
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then 20
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'EQS' then 30
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IFS' then 40                              
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CIRS' then 10                              
                                  end id_rubrique_cible
                            ,case 
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IRS' then 'Interest Rate Swap'
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then 'Credit Default Swap'
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'EQS' then 'Performance Swap'
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'IFS' then 'Inflation Swap'                              
                                  when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CIRS' then 'Interest Rate Swap'/*'Cross currency IRS'*/                             
                                  end lib_rubrique_cible                                                       
                            ,qstdc.id_rubrique_cible id_rubrique_cible_old
                            ,qstdc.lib_rubrique_cible lib_rubrique_cible_old
                            ,qstdc.sequence_niveau sequence_niveau_old
                            ,srq_photo.key_ref_instrument
                            ,srq_photo.id_ins_code
                            ,srq_photo.ins_lng_description
                            ,srq_photo.ins_aim
                            ,srq_photo.ins_maturity_date
                            ,case 
                                when rtrim(qsrs.taux_recu,'0123456789.,-') is null and length(qsrs.taux_recu) is not null then
                                    case
                                        when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_recu,'.',','),'FM9G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
                                        else
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_recu,'.',','),'FM9G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')||'%'
                                        end
                                else qsrs.taux_recu
                                end taux_recu
                            ,case 
                                when rtrim(qsrs.taux_verse,'0123456789.,-') is null and length(qsrs.taux_verse) is not null then
                                    case
                                        when qsrs.nature_contrat in 'CDS' then
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_verse,'.',','),'FM9G990D00','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')
                                        else
                                            to_char(replace(qsrs.taux_verse,'.',','),'FM9G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')||'%'
                                        end
                                else qsrs.taux_verse
                                end taux_verse
                            ,srq_photo.ins_counterpart
                            ,srq_photo.act_sht_description_ctp
                            ,nvl(qsrs.contrepartie,'#O/S') act_lng_description_ctp
                            ,srq_photo.ocr_id_translation_cpt                                
                            ,srq_photo.ins_sht_description_sj
                            ,srq_photo.ins_lng_description_sj                                        
                            ,srq_photo.id_ndna_pos_status_1             
                            ,srq_photo.id_ndna_pos_status_2             
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_quotation_cur
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_share_par ndna_share_par_tmp
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_share_par ndna_share_par_old
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_cost_price                                        
                            ,(srq_photo.ndna_fund_dirty_value - srq_photo.ndna_fund_income) ndna_fund_dirty_value_org
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_income ndna_fund_income_org
                            ,abs(srq_photo.ndna_fund_dirty_value_h - srq_photo.ndna_fund_income_h) ndna_fund_dirty_value_h
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_unreal_pl ndna_fund_unreal_pl_org
                            ,srq_photo.ndna_fund_dirty_value_h ndna_fund_dirty_value_h_old
                            ,qsrs.description_sj
                        from 
                            qxp.qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo
                        left join qxp.qxp_structure qs on srq_photo.id_structure=qs.id_structure
                        left join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on srq_photo.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                            and srq_photo.id_gabarit = qasgc.id_gabarit
                            and srq_photo.id_gabarit = ?
                            and srq_photo.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code                                    
                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on srq_photo.id_fnd_code=qc.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_transco_data_source qstds on srq_photo.ocr_id_translation_cpt='OCR\'||qstds.id_critere_source
                             and qstds.tableau_id='NOTE_SWAPS_AMUNDI_EN'             
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_transco_data_cible qstdc on qstds.id_rubrique_cible=qstdc.id_rubrique_cible    
                             and qstds.tableau_id=qstdc.tableau_id                                               
                        left join 
                                (
                                select distinct *
                                from qxp.qxp_sup_ref_swp 
                                )qsrs on srq_photo.id_ins_code=qsrs.id_ins_code
                             and qsrs.echeance_rapport=?
                             and qsrs.nom_rapport='AMUNDI FUND'

                        /*Gestion des Master-Feeders*/
                        left join qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=srq_photo.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping in 'MASTER-FEEDERS'
                            and qsm.date_campagne in '31/12/2199'

                        where
                            srq_photo.id_structure=?
                            and srq_photo.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                            and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart >=?)
                            and srq_photo.id_ins_category in ('SWAT','OPTI','DECR')
                            and srq_photo.ndna_share_par<>0
                        )srq0
                    )srq1
                where
                     index_jambe_swaps=1 /*Eliminer la deuxième jambe de swaps*/
                     and not (id_ins_category='OPTI' and options_classiques is null) /*Eliminer les options en position sur d'autres compartiments que MENA (409096)*/
                )srq2
            )srq4
         /*Filtre de la matrice*/
         where            
             (
             /*Titre de la note*/    
             (niveau='N0' and rupture_note_asc=1)         
             /*Sous-titre de la note*/    
             or (niveau='N1' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
            /*Ligne d'introduction*/
            or (niveau='N2' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)    
            /*Titre de compartiment*/
             or (niveau='N3' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
            /*Titre de colonne*/
             or (niveau='N4' and rupture_compart_asc=1 and id_colonne < 2) --decode(id_rubrique_cible,20,3,2))/*2 données devise fonds pour les CDS sinon 1 seule*/
            /*Ligne de détail*/
             or (niveau='N5' and id_colonne < decode(id_rubrique_cible,10,7,20,8,30,7,40,7,50,8,60,8,70,7)) /*Nombre de colonnes différent par tableau*/
            /*Ligne de total ou Phrase de fin de compart*/
             or (niveau='N6' and rupture_compart_desc=1 and id_colonne < decode(id_rubrique_cible,10,2,20,2,30,2,40,2,60,2,70,2,1) and nb_positions_compart >0) /*2 données totalisées*/
             or (niveau='N7' and rupture_compart_desc=1 and id_colonne < decode(id_rubrique_cible,10,2,20,2,30,2,40,2,60,2,70,2,1))
             )
             and
                /*Elimination des lignes de pied de page suite à évolution besoin client*/
                1=
                case 
                    when niveau='N7' and id_rubrique_cible in (60,70) then 0
                    else 1
                    end
          
        )srq5   
    )
order by
     id_rubrique_cible
     ,position
     ,rupture_compart_asc
     ,niveau
